steps.title: Find the ratio a/b from the first equation
Substitute into the second equation
steps.content:
The second equation $\frac{a}{bn} = 17.5$ can be rewritten as $\frac{a}{b} \cdot \frac{1}{n} = 17.5$.

Substituting $\frac{a}{b} = 0.7$:

$$0.7 \cdot \frac{1}{n} = 17.5$$

Divide both sides by 0.7:

$$\frac{1}{n} = \frac{17.5}{0.7} = 25$$
